title: Tunisian Fregola Pilaf with Shattering Vegetables
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish from Tunisia, made with fregola, vegetables, and a hint of winey flavors.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the chopped carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add the fregola, pilaf spice mix, and salt. Stir to combine.
5. Add the red wine and stir to deglaze the pan.
6. Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the fregola is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
8. Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
